title: Xi Jinping handed historic third term as China's president
description: Xi Jinping was handed a third term as Chinese president on Friday, capping a rise that has seen him become the country's most powerful leader in generations.
keywords: Asia / Pacific, China, Xi Jinping, Communist parties, Maoist
